translations.#### [2022/07/18 Update]： [手把手教你無痛轉移 Med: #### [2022/07/18 Update]: [Step-by-step Guide to Seamlessly Migrate Medium to a Self-hosted Website](../a0c08d579ab1/)
translations.***合理，因為 Medium 官方不希望使用者能輕易地將內容轉移至其他平台。*: ***Makes sense, because Medium officially does not want users to easily transfer content to other platforms.***
translations.***本項目及本篇文章僅供技術研究，請勿用於任何商業用途，請勿用於非法用途，如有: ***This project and article are for technical research only. Do not use for any commercial purposes or illegal activities. The author is not responsible for any illegal actions taken by others using this content.***
translations.***特別感謝前同事 [Nick](https://medium.com/u/d: ***Special thanks to former colleagues [Nick](https://medium.com/u/d713969ca7ed){:target="_blank"}, [Chun-Hsiu Liu](https://medium.com/u/72361fccaa43){:target="_blank"}*** *, and James **for their collaboration in research. I will rewrite it in native code when I have time.***
translations.***請確認您有文章使用、著作權再行下載備份。***\n\n: ***Please ensure you have the rights to use and reproduce the articles before downloading and backing them up.***
translations.**如何透過輸入使用者名稱得到文章列表？**\n\n: **How to Get the Article List by Entering a Username?**
translations.- Article list: can be found in `result[:
- Article list: can be found in `result[0]->userResult->homepagePostsConnection->posts`

- `homepagePostsFrom` pagination info: can be found in `result[0]->userResult->homepagePostsConnection->pagingInfo->next`  
  Use `homepagePostsFrom` in the request to access pagination; `nil` means there is no next page.
translations.- Markdown Format\n\n- Automatically dow:
- Markdown Format

- Automatically download all Medium posts of the User based on the User

- Article images can also be downloaded and backed up.

- Must be able to parse Gist into Markdown code blocks  
  (My Medium posts heavily use gist to embed source code, so this feature is very important)
translations.- No login, no special permissions neede:
- No login, no special permissions needed

- Support downloading and converting a single article or all articles from a user into Markdown

- Supports downloading and backing up all images within the article and converting them to corresponding image paths

- Supports deep parsing of embedded [Gist](https://gist.github.com/){:target="_blank"} in articles and converts them into Markdown code blocks of the corresponding language

- Supports parsing Twitter content and embedding it into the article

- Supports parsing embedded YouTube videos in articles, converting them into video preview images and links displayed in Markdown

- When downloading all articles of a user, the tool scans for embedded related articles within the content and replaces the links with local ones if found

- Specially optimized for Medium format styles

- Automatically updates the downloaded article's last modified/created time to match the Medium article's publish time

- Automatically compares the downloaded article's last modification time; if it is not older than the Medium article's last modification time, skips the download  
  (This helps users create automatic sync/backup tools, saving server bandwidth and time)

- CLI operation with automation support
translations.- Support downloading posts and converti:
- Support downloading posts and converting to markdown format

- Support downloading all posts and converting to markdown format from any user without login access.

- Support download of paid content

- Support downloading all post images locally and converting to local paths

- Support parsing Twitter tweet content into blockquotes

- Support download of paid content

- Support command line interface

- Convert [Gist](https://gist.github.com/){:target="_blank"} source code to markdown code block

- Convert YouTube links embedded in posts to preview images

- Adjust post’s last modification date from Medium to the local downloaded markdown file

- Auto skip when post has been downloaded and the last modification date from Medium hasn’t changed (convenient for auto-sync or auto-backup services, saving server bandwidth and execution time)

- [Support using Github Action as auto sync/backup service](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown/tree/main#using-github-action-as-your-free-auto-syncbackup-service){:target="_blank"}

- Highly optimized markdown format for Medium

- Native Markdown Style Render Engine (Feel free to contribute if you have any optimization ideas! `MarkupStyleRender.rb`)

- [jekyll](https://jekyllrb.com/){:target="_blank"} & social share (og: tag) friendly

- 100% Ruby @ [RubyGem](https://rubygems.org/gems/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"}
translations.- The opening and closing strings of a w:
- The opening and closing strings of a wrapping format must be distinguishable. Strong happens to have both opening and closing as `**`, but for a Link, the opening is `[` and the closing is `](URL)`.

- When combining Markdown symbols with text, make sure there are no spaces before or after, or it will not work.
translations.1.取得 UserID：檢視使用者主頁(https://medium.com/@:
1. Get UserID: View the source code of the user homepage (https://medium.com/@#{username}) to find the `UserID` corresponding to the `Username`.  
[Note that since Medium has reopened custom domains](../d9a95d4224ea/), you need to handle 30X redirects accordingly.
translations.2.嗅探網路請求可以發現 Medium 使用 GraphQL 去取得主頁的文章列: 2. Sniffing network requests reveals that Medium uses GraphQL to fetch the homepage article list information
translations.3.複製 Query & 替換 UserID 到請求資訊\n\n: 3. Copy the Query & Replace UserID in the Request Information

I will rewrite it in native code when I have time.***

translations.```\n- 第 5 到第 7 字元要標示為 程式碼 (用`Text`格式包裝):
```
- Characters 5 to 7 should be marked as code (wrapped with `Text` format)
- Characters 18 to 22 should be marked as a link (using [Text](URL) format)
- Characters 50 to 63 should be marked as bold (using *Text* format)
- Characters 55 to 69 should be marked as italic (using _Text_ format)
```
translations.```\nHOST: https://medium.com/_/graphql\:
```
HOST: https://medium.com/_/graphql
METHOD: POST
query = [{
"operationName": "UserProfileQuery",
"variables": {
"homepagePostsFrom": homepagePostsFrom,
"includeDistributedResponses": true,
"id": userID,
"homepagePostsLimit": 10
},
"query": "query Us...."
}]
```

```
translations.`homepagePostsFrom` 分頁資訊 ：可以在 `result[0]:
`homepagePostsFrom` pagination info: can be found in `result[0]->userResult->homepagePostsConnection->pagingInfo->next`  
Use `homepagePostsFrom` in the request to access pagination; `nil` means there is no next page.
translations.之前曾經手動備份過，非常無聊且浪費時間，所以一直在找尋一個可以自動把所有文章備份: I used to back up manually, which was very boring and time-consuming, so I have been looking for a tool that can automatically back up and download all articles, preferably converting them to Markdown format.
translations.使用者所有文章下載時會去掃描文章內有無嵌入關聯文章，有的話會將連結替換為本地\n: When downloading all articles of a user, the tool scans for embedded related articles within the content and replaces the links with local ones if found.
translations.依照 User 能自動下載該 User 的所有 Medium Posts\n: Automatically download all Medium posts of the User based on the User
translations.免登入、免特殊權限\n: No login, no special permissions needed
translations.包裝格式的字串頭跟尾要能區別，Strong 只是剛好頭跟尾都是 `**` ，如果: The opening and closing strings of a wrapping format must be distinguishable. Strong happens to have both opening and closing as `**`, but for a Link, the opening is `[` and the closing is `](URL)`.
translations.可針對 Medium 文章連結、Medium 使用者的所有文章，爬取其內容並轉換: A backup tool that crawls content from Medium article links or all articles of a Medium user, converts them into Markdown format, and downloads the articles along with embedded images.
translations.官方雖然有提供匯出備份功能，但匯出格式僅能用於匯入 Medum、非 Markdo: Although the official platform provides an export backup feature, the export format can only be used for importing back into Medium, not Markdown or common formats, and it does not handle embedded content such as [Github Gist](https://gist.github.com/){:target="_blank"} … and others.
translations.意思是 `code in text, and link in text, and: The meaning of `code in text, and link in text, and ZhgChgLi, and bold, and I, only i` in this text:
translations.我們要做的事也一樣，解析這個 JSON，比對 Type 在 Markdown 的: What we need to do is the same: parse this JSON, match the Type to the Markdown style, and assemble the Markdown format.
translations.撰寫小工具將 Medium 心血文章備份下來 & 轉換成 Markdown 格式: Writing a Tool to Backup Medium Articles & Convert Them to Markdown Format
translations.支援下載備份文章內的所有圖片並轉換成對應圖片路徑\n: Supports downloading and backing up all images within the article and converting them to corresponding image paths
translations.支援單篇文章、使用者所有文章下載並轉換成 Markdown\n: Support downloading and converting a single article or all articles from a user into Markdown
translations.支援深度解析內嵌於文章中的 [Gist](https://gist.github: Supports deep parsing of embedded [Gist](https://gist.github.com/){:target="_blank"} in articles and converts them into Markdown Code Blocks of the corresponding language
translations.支援解析 Twitter 內容並轉貼到文章中\n: Supports parsing Twitter content and embedding it into the article
translations.支援解析內嵌於文章中的 Youtube 影片，將轉換成影片預覽圖及連結顯示於 M: Supports parsing embedded YouTube videos in articles, converting them into video preview images and links displayed in Markdown
translations.文章列表：可以在 `result[0]->userResult->homepag: Article list: can be found in `result[0]->userResult->homepagePostsConnection->posts`
translations.文章圖片也要能被下載備份下來\n: Article images can also be downloaded and backed up.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有找到試用了幾個 Chrome Extension (幾乎都被下架了)，效果不好: I found and tried several Chrome Extensions (most have been removed), but the results were poor. First, you have to manually open and back up each article one by one. Second, the parsed format contained many errors, and they couldn’t deeply parse Gist source code or back up all images in the articles.
translations.某位大神用 js 寫的，能達成基本的下載及轉換成 Markdown 功能，但一樣: A skilled developer wrote it in JS, achieving basic downloading and conversion to Markdown, but it still lacks image backup and deep parsing of Gist source code.
translations.檢視文章原始碼後可發現，Medium 是使用 [Apollo Client](h: After inspecting the article's source code, it can be seen that Medium uses [Apollo Client](https://www.apollographql.com/docs/react/){:target="_blank"} for its service; the HTML is actually rendered from JS. Therefore, by checking the <script> section in the source code, you can find the `window.__APOLLO_STATE__` field, which contains the entire article's paragraph structure. Medium breaks your article into sentence-by-sentence paragraphs and then uses the JS engine to render it back into HTML.
translations.正確的組合結果如下：\n\n: The correct combination result is as follows:
translations.每次只能拿 10 筆，要分頁拿取。\n\n: Only 10 items can be fetched at a time; pagination is required.
translations.第 5 到 7 & 18 到 22 在這個例子裡好處理，因為沒有交錯到；但 50: Lines 5 to 7 & 18 to 22 are easy to handle in this example because there is no overlap; however, lines 50–63 & 55–69 have overlapping issues, which Markdown cannot represent with the following overlapping method:
translations.經營 Medium 第三年，已累積發表超過 65 篇文章；所有文章都是我直接使用: In my third year of managing Medium, I have published over 65 articles; all were written directly on the Medium platform with no other backups. Honestly, I have always feared that issues with Medium or other factors might cause the loss of these years of hard work.
translations.自動將下載下來文章的最後修改/建立時間，更改為同 Medium 文章發佈時間\n: Automatically update the downloaded article's last modified/created time to match the Medium article's publish time
translations.自動比對下載下來的文章最後修改，如果沒有小於 Medium 文章最後修改時間時則:
Automatically compare the downloaded article's last modification time; if it is not older than the Medium article's last modification time, skip the download  
(This helps users create automatic Sync/Backup tools, saving server bandwidth and time)
translations.苦無完美解決方案後，下定決心自行撰寫一個備份轉換工具；花費了大約三週的下班時間使: After finding no perfect solution, I decided to write my own backup and conversion tool; it took about three weeks of after-work hours using Ruby to complete.
translations.要能 Parse Gist 成 Markdown Code Block\n(我的:
Must be able to parse Gist into Markdown code blocks  
(My Medium posts heavily use gist to embed source code, so this feature is very important)
translations.這塊研究了好久，目前先使用現成套件解決 [reverse_markdown](h: This part was studied for a long time, and currently, an existing package is used to solve it: [reverse_markdown](https://github.com/xijo/reverse_markdown){:target="_blank"}.
translations.這邊有一個技術困難點就是在渲染段落文字樣式時，Medium 給的結構如下：\n\: Here is a technical challenge when rendering paragraph text styles, the structure provided by Medium is as follows:
translations.針對 Medium 格式樣式特別優化\n: Specially optimized for Medium format styles
